case_title: DISH SF VS. TIMOTHY HAYES ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISH SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYES, TIMOTHY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 144 EDDY STREET, UNIT #304 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78564217)
